security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; worker-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net https://storage.googleapis.com blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob: mediastream:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
